entry.title: Fly Client Proposal
entry.summary: The email conversation primarily focuses on the discussion about potential improvements to Simplified Payment Verification (SPV) clients rather than FlyClient, which is of less interest due to Bitcoin's relatively small header chain. The enhancements discussed aim at incorporating protocol support to advance the functionality of SPV clients beyond their historical implementations. This dialogue appears in the context of a thread in the "Bitcoin Development Mailing List," to which the participants, including Zac Mitton, are subscribed. The mention of these techniques suggests an ongoing exploration of how Bitcoin's SPV clients could be optimized for better performance and reliability.
